commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an opt-in `approvals.plugin.language` config and SDK-facing renderer for plain-language plugin approval prompts, wires it through fallback delivery and Telegram/Matrix native approval payloads, updates docs/generated baselines, and adds renderer/forwarder tests.

PR surface: Source +3711, Tests +2783, Docs +10, Generated 0. Total +6504 across 41 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced regression: the PR head source and tests show raw/simple-technical fallback text uses `/approve <id>` while button values use the real approval id. The central requested behavior is a feature, not a current-main bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the concrete fallback placeholder regression; the remaining config/SDK/security-boundary approval still needs human maintainer review.
